content:
# Micro Fracture Testing

**Summary**: A technique used to determine in-situ stress magnitudes by measuring closure and breakdown pressures.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2014-al-haidary|Al-Haidary, 2014]] used micro-fracture-testing to calibrate minimum and maximum horizontal stress values.

## Key Results and Findings

- Closure pressure was used for Sh calculation, while breakdown pressure was used for SH estimation. ([[2014-al-haidary|Al-Haidary, 2014, p. 70]])
